statusLine.command: sh -c 'if [ -x .claude/scripts/mnemos-statusline.sh ]; then exec .claude/scripts/mnemos-statusline.sh; elif [ -x "$HOME/.claude/templates/mnemos-statusline.sh" ]; then exec "$HOME/.claude/templates/mnemos-statusline.sh"; fi'

permissions._stack_allow_note: Add your stack's build/test/run commands to allow[], e.g. Bash(./gradlew *) / Bash(npm test *) / Bash(pytest *). Remove this key.

hooks.command: if [ -x ".claude/scripts/mnemos-pre-compact.sh" ]; then exec ".claude/scripts/mnemos-pre-compact.sh"; elif [ -x "$HOME/.claude/templates/mnemos-pre-compact.sh" ]; then exec "$HOME/.claude/templates/mnemos-pre-compact.sh"; fi; exit 0

if [ -x ".claude/scripts/mnemos-post-compact-inject.sh" ]; then exec ".claude/scripts/mnemos-post-compact-inject.sh"; elif [ -x "$HOME/.claude/templates/mnemos-post-compact-inject.sh" ]; then exec "$HOME/.claude/templates/mnemos-post-compact-inject.sh"; fi; exit 0

if [ -x ".claude/scripts/mnemos-pre-edit.sh" ]; then exec ".claude/scripts/mnemos-pre-edit.sh"; elif [ -x "$HOME/.claude/templates/mnemos-pre-edit.sh" ]; then exec "$HOME/.claude/templates/mnemos-pre-edit.sh"; fi; exit 0

if [ -x ".claude/scripts/mnemos-post-tool.sh" ]; then exec ".claude/scripts/mnemos-post-tool.sh"; elif [ -x "$HOME/.claude/templates/mnemos-post-tool.sh" ]; then exec "$HOME/.claude/templates/mnemos-post-tool.sh"; fi; exit 0

if [ -x ".claude/scripts/mnemos-stop-checkpoint.sh" ]; then exec ".claude/scripts/mnemos-stop-checkpoint.sh"; elif [ -x "$HOME/.claude/templates/mnemos-stop-checkpoint.sh" ]; then exec "$HOME/.claude/templates/mnemos-stop-checkpoint.sh"; fi; exit 0

if [ -x ".claude/scripts/mnemos-stop-ingest.sh" ]; then exec ".claude/scripts/mnemos-stop-ingest.sh"; elif [ -x "$HOME/.claude/templates/mnemos-stop-ingest.sh" ]; then exec "$HOME/.claude/templates/mnemos-stop-ingest.sh"; fi; exit 0

if [ -x ".claude/scripts/mnemos-session-start.sh" ]; then exec ".claude/scripts/mnemos-session-start.sh"; elif [ -x "$HOME/.claude/templates/mnemos-session-start.sh" ]; then exec "$HOME/.claude/templates/mnemos-session-start.sh"; fi; exit 0
